source.authority: Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan
source.scope: Official-source-backed Kazakhstan calendar-year 2026 general individual income-tax schedule on caller-confirmed annual taxable income.

KZ.notes: General Article 363 schedule at 10% through 8,500 MRP and 15% on the excess, using the KZT 4,325 MRP effective on 1 January 2026. Deduction derivation and special-category schedules remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 general individual income tax on caller-confirmed annual taxable income.
